featureName: Unified Document Bucket + E2E Document Upload Tests
description: Fix property document uploads (bucket not found) by creating a single 'documents' bucket used by all 3 document systems. Keep separate tables (best practice: FK constraints, simple RLS). Add E2E tests for document uploads in building/lot/contract flows.

userStories.title: Create 'documents' storage bucket via migration
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single 'documents' Supabase Storage bucket so that all document uploads (property, intervention, contract) go to one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Migration creates 'documents' bucket with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
50MB file size limit, all relevant MIME types allowed (images, PDF, Office, audio, zip)
4 storage.objects RLS policies (INSERT/SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE) for authenticated users
supabase/config.toml updated with [storage.buckets.documents] for local dev
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Migration 20260220150000: bucket 'documents' + get_team_id_from_document_path() helper + 4 storage RLS policies + property_documents DEFAULT updated. config.toml updated.

userStories.title: Point all 3 upload routes to 'documents' bucket
userStories.description: As a user, I want property/intervention/contract document uploads to use the new 'documents' bucket so that all uploads succeed.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/property-documents/upload/route.ts: bucket changed from 'property-documents' to 'documents' (3 occurrences)
app/api/upload-intervention-document/route.ts: bucket changed from 'intervention-documents' to 'documents' (3 occurrences)
app/api/upload-contract-document/route.ts: bucket changed from 'contract-documents' to 'documents' (3 occurrences)
lib/services/domain/storage.service.ts: add 'documents' bucket config alongside existing ones
property_documents table DEFAULT updated in migration (storage_bucket column)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: All 3 upload routes pointed to 'documents' bucket. storage.service.ts updated with 'documents' config (50MB, 15 MIME types). CRITICAL FIX: intervention route path changed from interventions/{id}/... to {team_id}/{id}/... to match documents bucket RLS path-based access.

userStories.title: Update download/view routes to support both old and new buckets
userStories.description: As a user, I want to download documents regardless of which bucket they were uploaded to (old or new), so that existing documents remain accessible.
acceptanceCriteria: Download routes read storage_bucket from document row (not hardcoded)
app/api/download-intervention-document/route.ts + [id]/route.ts: use doc.storage_bucket
app/api/property-documents/[id]/download/route.ts: use doc.storage_bucket
Old documents (in 'intervention-documents' bucket) still downloadable
New documents (in 'documents' bucket) downloadable
Lint passes
userStories.notes: No changes needed — all 3 download/view routes already use doc.storage_bucket with fallback to old bucket name. Pattern: .from(document.storage_bucket || 'old-bucket'). Also verified view-intervention-document/route.ts uses same pattern.

userStories.title: E2E: Building creation with document upload
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests that verify document uploads work during building creation (step 4/5), so we have regression protection.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapt existing building-creation.e2e.ts to include document upload step
Test uploads at least 1 document during building creation wizard
Test verifies document appears in the created building's detail page (or toast/no error)
All existing building creation tests still pass
Tests pass in 2 consecutive runs
userStories.notes: Added data-testid to document-slot-generic.tsx file inputs. Added document upload methods to building-wizard.page.ts POM. Modified submission test to include doc upload in step 3. 8/8 tests pass 2x consecutive. Key fix: Radix TabsTrigger requires Puppeteer native click (not page.evaluate), and TabsContent only renders children when active.

userStories.title: E2E: Lot creation with document upload
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests that verify document uploads work during lot creation (step 4/5), so we have regression protection for both existing-building and independent modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Adapt existing lot-creation.e2e.ts to include document upload step
Test uploads at least 1 document during lot creation wizard
Test verifies document upload doesn't error (toast or document visible)
All existing lot creation tests still pass (12 tests)
Tests pass in 2 consecutive runs
userStories.notes: Added document upload methods to lot-wizard.page.ts POM (switchToDocumentsTab, expandFirstLotAccordion, uploadDocumentToSlot, hasStagedFile). Modified both submission tests to include doc upload in step 3. Key fix: Independent mode has accordion per lot — must expand first before doc inputs appear in DOM (double-nested conditional rendering: tab + accordion). 12/12 tests pass 2x consecutive.

userStories.title: E2E: Contract creation with document upload
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests that verify document uploads work during contract creation, so we have regression protection for the contract document flow.
acceptanceCriteria: New or adapted E2E test for contract creation flow with document upload
Test uploads at least 1 document during contract creation
Test verifies document upload succeeds (no error, document visible or toast)
Tests pass in 2 consecutive runs
